description:
Batch 3/5 — Observability (1 of 2)

Extend DaemonHealth and the daemon status response to include pool metrics:

- pool_size: configured maximum concurrent agents
- active_agents: currently running (already exists)
- queued_tasks: tasks/workflows waiting for a pool slot
- pool_utilization_percent: active_agents / pool_size * 100
- avg_agent_duration_secs: moving average of recent agent execution times
- total_agents_spawned: since daemon start
- total_agents_completed: since daemon start
- total_agents_failed: since daemon start

Update DaemonHealth in orchestrator-core/src/types.rs, the daemon health handler, and the MCP ao.daemon.status / ao.runner.health tools to include these fields. The AgentPool struct (from TASK-109) should track these metrics internally.
title: Add pool utilization metrics to daemon status and health endpoints
